originalClaim: 5G cell towers spread the COVID-19 virus.
Drinking bleach cures coronavirus infections.
Vaccines contain microchips that track people.
The 2020 moon landing footage was filmed in a studio.
Lemon water cures stage four cancer.
Wind turbines cause cancer in nearby residents.
The Great Wall of China is visible from the Moon with the naked eye.
Eating carrots dramatically improves night vision in adults.
Humans only use ten percent of their brains.
5G-masten verspreiden het coronavirus.
Vaccins bevatten microchips om mensen te volgen.
Knoflook eten beschermt volledig tegen een corona-infectie.
Het drinken van warm water doodt het coronavirus in de keel.
Goldfish have a memory span of only three seconds.
Cracking your knuckles causes arthritis later in life.
Sugar consumption makes children hyperactive.
Bananas are radioactive enough to be dangerous to eat.
Lightning never strikes the same place twice.
A swallowed piece of chewing gum stays in your stomach for seven years.
Microwaving food destroys all of its nutrients.
A new viral diet melts belly fat in three days without exercise.
Een onbekend kruid geneest diabetes type 2 binnen een week.
The Amsterdam city council approved a car-free zone in the center in 2024.
De gemeente Rotterdam verhoogde de parkeertarieven in januari 2024.
A new tram line opened between Utrecht Centraal and the science park in 2023.
The Dutch government raised the minimum wage in January 2024.
Storm Poly caused widespread rail disruption in the Netherlands in July 2023.
The local school in the village closed due to declining enrollment last year.
A regional hospital announced an emergency department closure in 2024.
The city installed two hundred new EV charging points in 2023.
Den Haag introduceerde een milieuzone voor oude dieselautos in 2024.
A new flood barrier was completed near the coastal town in 2023.
The municipality banned fireworks in the city center for New Year 2024.
A local festival drew a record fifty thousand visitors this summer.
The province approved funding for a new cycling bridge in 2024.
A water main burst flooded several streets downtown last week.
The regional airport added three new international routes in 2023.
De NS schrapte enkele nachttreinen op dit traject in 2024.
The town hall switched entirely to solar power in 2023.
A new public library branch opened in the eastern district this year.
The city reported a drop in bicycle thefts after installing guarded racks.
Roadworks on the ring road will continue through the end of 2024.
Water boils at one hundred degrees Celsius at sea level.
The Earth completes one orbit around the Sun in about 365 days.
Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth.
The human heart has four chambers.
Paris is the capital city of France.
The speed of light in a vacuum is about 300,000 kilometers per second.
The Netherlands has twelve provinces.
Water bestaat uit waterstof en zuurstof.
Amsterdam is de hoofdstad van Nederland.

Honey does not spoil if stored properly.
The adult human body has 206 bones.
Sound travels faster in water than in air.
The freezing point of water is zero degrees Celsius at sea level.
A leap year occurs every four years with century exceptions.

DNA carries the genetic instructions of living organisms.

Photosynthesis converts sunlight into chemical energy in plants.
The Great Barrier Reef is located off the coast of Australia.
Iron rusts when exposed to oxygen and moisture.
The euro is the official currency of the Netherlands.
A triangle has three sides and three angles.
Whales are mammals, not fish.
The boiling point of water decreases at higher altitudes.
Het menselijk lichaam bestaat voor het grootste deel uit water.

The Nile is one of the longest rivers in the world.
Glass is made primarily from sand.
Bees play a key role in pollinating many crops.
This is the best movie ever made.
The government should lower taxes next year.

Modern art is just lazy and meaningless.
Everyone would be happier living in the countryside.

Artificial intelligence will replace most jobs by next decade.
The new policy is morally wrong and should be reversed.
Cities are becoming more crowded than rural areas overall.
Renewable energy adoption has been rising in recent years.
